title: Grilled Norwegian Red Chilis Stir-fry
description: This earthy, velvety Norwegian dish features grilled dried red chilis in a rich, savory sauce that's perfect for warming up on chilly evenings.

ingredients.name: Garlic Cloves
ingredients.notes: Minced and lightly sautéed in oil before adding chilis

instructions: Combine chilis, salt, and oil in a bowl. Mix well until the chilis are evenly coated with the mixture.
Grill the chilis for about 3-5 minutes on each side or until lightly charred, keeping an eye on them as they can quickly burn if left under too much heat.
While grilling the chilis, prepare a pan. Heat oil in it and add minced garlic and onion; sauté gently until soft.
Add grilled chilis to the pan with the garlic-onion mixture. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes, making sure not to burn them.
Stir in tomato sauce or paste, soy sauce, water, cumin seeds, and coriander powder. Bring it to a simmer; keep stirring until the sauce thickens slightly.
Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles as a side dish or on its own for a hearty meal.
